title: ATS-Optimized Resume Bullet Rewriter by Job Description
description: Prompts that help job seekers paste any job posting and transform weak, generic resume bullets into keyword-rich, metric-driven lines that pass applicant tracking systems.
gumroad_description:
Your resume is getting filtered out before a human ever reads it — and generic bullets are why.

Who this is for

  • Career changers who need to reframe past experience around a new industry's language
  • Job seekers applying to roles where they meet the requirements but keep hearing nothing back
  • Professionals who know their work was valuable but struggle to prove it on paper with numbers

What's inside

  • 25 targeted prompts — each designed for a specific rewrite scenario: weak verbs, missing metrics, keyword gaps, and more
  • Paste-any-job-posting workflow — prompts extract the exact ATS keywords from real postings and weave them in naturally
  • Markdown + JSON format — use in ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini without reformatting anything
  • Metric-generation prompts — helps you quantify impact even when you don't think you have hard numbers

Stop guessing why you're not getting callbacks. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com.
